positions.title: Postdoctoral Researcher — NLP & Steering Vectors
positions.description: Develop and validate Conceptor-based steering methods for LLMs. Strong background in representation learning, mechanistic interpretability, or activation engineering. Experience with clinical NLP a plus.
required_skills: PhD in NLP, ML, or related field
preferred_skills: Familiarity with steering vectors or activation engineering

positions.title: Research Scientist — Speech & Multimodal AI
positions.description: Work on acoustic biomarker extraction, speaker diarization, and multimodal Conceptor integration from clinical interview recordings. Experience with wav2vec, Whisper, or clinical speech analysis preferred.
required_skills: MS or PhD in speech processing, signal processing, or related
Experience with ASR and speaker diarization systems
preferred_skills: Experience with wav2vec 2.0 or Whisper fine-tuning
Background in mental health or clinical data

positions.title: Research Engineer — Platform Development
positions.description: Build the digital twin training platform — integrating Conceptor-steered LLMs with avatar rendering (SoulMachines), session recording, and automated feedback systems. Full-stack experience with ML deployment.
required_skills: Experience deploying ML models in production

positions.title: Research Coordinator — Clinical Evaluation
positions.description: Coordinate stakeholder surveys, focus groups, and the trainee-tool-trainer implementation readiness study. Experience with IRB protocols, mixed-methods research, and mental health populations.
required_skills: BA/BS in psychology, public health, or related field
Experience with IRB protocols and human subjects research
preferred_skills: Experience working with mental health populations
Familiarity with REDCap or similar data collection platforms
